title: Godot MCP
description: MCP server enabling LLM agents (Claude, Cursor) to control Godot projects via natural language — 30+ tools for scene, script, execution, and asset management.
longDescription:
Godot MCP is an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that gives LLM agents like Claude and Cursor direct control over Godot game projects through natural language. Used by 10+ active users, it bridges the gap between AI assistants and Godot's editor — enabling end-to-end 2D/3D game development automation without manual engine interaction.

Built 30+ tools covering scene creation and management, GDScript authoring and execution, asset discovery, node manipulation, and project configuration. Implements secure path validation and structured routing throughout. Includes auto-config detection so agents can identify the active project without manual setup, CI/CD integration for automated testing, and multi-client support for Claude, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible runtimes.
